title: I Release Conflict with Sleep and Allow Cooperation
subtitle: An energy statement for ending the internal war and moving toward body-mind partnership in rest
excerpt: A short energy statement for Day 29 of a 30-day sleep programme. The release names the pattern of fighting the body over sleep directly — the blame, the monitoring, the dread. The allow names cooperation: body and mind as partners who want the same thing and are ready to stop fighting about it.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 29 theme of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798269649795). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use in the evening when the body feels like an obstacle rather than a partner — when the approach to sleep is one of monitoring, bracing, or blame.

content.text: A short energy statement for Day 29 of a 30-day sleep programme. Day 29 theme: end the battle with sleep. The release names the conflict pattern directly — the years of fighting, fearing, and blaming the body for how sleep has gone. The allow names cooperation as the alternative: body and mind as partners who want the same outcome and have agreed to stop working against each other.
I am ready to release all conflict, fear, and blame around sleep and my body's ability to rest. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow full cooperation between my body and mind in rest — working together, trusting each other, wanting the same thing. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 29 theme of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
